features.name: rand union with rand struct member
features.description: Code should include a rand union containing a packed struct with rand bit fields, where the union is a class member randomized via randomize()

features.name: nested rand union in rand union
features.description: Code should include a rand union containing another rand union, where the outer union is a class member randomized via randomize()

features.name: union randomized via class randomize method
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand union member that is randomized using the randomize() method call
features.snippet:
class UnionTest; rand PackedUnion my_union; function new(); my_union.raw_bits = 12'b0; endfunction endclass
initial begin test = new(); void'(test.randomize()); end
